# Extracao: transcription_mp4_04__Identifying_Overarching_Themes

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_04__Identifying_Overarching_Themes.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT

---

Now, with at least six themes in one place, take a couple of moments to look them over. In some cases, the theme will be in every story. At a minimum, your partner should be able to link each theme back to at least two of the stories you told. Remember, an idea becomes a theme when it occurs in two or more stories. Storyteller circle the themes that jump off the page for you. The ones that inspire you and define what you care about most. Maybe there's one you love more than the others. This is where your partner can help. Ask them to weigh in on which of the themes seem more important, based on the stories you've told.
